response.justification: While the candidate possesses an exceptionally strong technical background as a Staff/Senior Software Engineer and is highly active in open-source development, he falls significantly short on two critical requirements for this executive role. Firstly, his German proficiency is basic, whereas the position strictly requires a minimum C1 level for client interactions. Secondly, his experience is primarily as an individual contributor rather than in executive-level operational leadership, formal team management, or IT consulting.
strengths: Extensive engineering experience building modern, scalable software systems and open-source platforms.
Strong technical versatility across multiple languages, frameworks, and deployment environments including Linux.
Demonstrated commitment to mentoring and knowledge sharing through workshops, talks, and organizing coding dojos.
concerns: Only basic German language skills, falling well below the required C1 proficiency.
Lacks executive-level leadership, formal team management, and technical project management experience.
No explicit mention of formal modeling (UML), IT security, risk management, or compliance expertise.
